text: I feel alert and intrigued, stepping into a space that is both modern and experimental. The glass walls and bright lighting give an atmosphere of transparency and openness, while the vivid R+D exhibit stirs my intellectual curiosity. Here, surrounded by innovation and design, I am prompted to reflect on how spaces shape our perceptions and stimulate our desire to learn and create. Being here, I sense an undercurrent of possibility—every detail an invitation to think more deeply about humanity’s relationship with technology and the built environment.
